hooks.command: test "$(git config --get core.hooksPath)" = .githooks || { git config core.hooksPath .githooks && echo 'restored core.hooksPath -> .githooks (project hooks were disabled)'; }

hooks.//: auto-feed Claude the latest git changes
hooks.command:
echo "## Repo state
Branch: $(git branch --show-current)

Uncommitted changes:
$(git status --short)

Last 5 commits:
$(git log --oneline -5)"

SessionStart.//: warn when other Claude Code sessions share this checkout; suggest EnterWorktree

hooks.//: automatically watch and fix the CI after a push
